ddls:
CREATE TABLE "election_results" (
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election */,
  "fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code of the county */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "votes" INTEGER /* Total votes cast */,
  "absentee_votes" INTEGER /* Number of absentee votes */,
  "reporting" TEXT /* Reporting status */,
  "precincts" INTEGER /* Number of precincts */,
  "absentee_method" TEXT /* Absentee voting method */,
  "eevp" REAL /* Estimated Election Day Vote Percentage (EEVP) */,
  "tot_exp_vote" INTEGER /* Total expected votes */,
  "election_type" TEXT /* Type of election (e.g., presidential, congressional) */,
  "election_date" TEXT /* Date of the election */,
  "total_registered_voters" INTEGER /* Total number of registered voters in the county */,
  "voter_turnout_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of registered voters who participated in the election */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_fips FOREIGN KEY ("fips") REFERENCES counties ("fips")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code of the county */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state" TEXT /* State the county belongs to */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the county */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the county in square miles */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the county */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of the county */,
  "racial_composition" TEXT /* Racial composition of the county (e.g., {'White': 60, 'Black': 20, 'Asian': 10, 'Other': 10}) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_counties_state FOREIGN KEY ("state") REFERENCES states ("name")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the state in square miles */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the candidate */,
  "party" TEXT /* Party affiliation of the candidate */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the candidate */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the candidate */,
  "incumbent" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the candidate is an incumbent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidate_results" (
  "candidate_result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate result */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate */,
  "votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes received */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of total votes */,
  "election_type" TEXT /* Type of election (e.g., presidential, congressional) */,
  "precincts_won" INTEGER /* Number of precincts won by the candidate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidate_results_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES election_results ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidate_results_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voting_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election */,
  "turnout_stage" TEXT /* Turnout stage */,
  "absentee_count_progress" TEXT /* Absentee count progress */,
  "absentee_outstanding" INTEGER /* Number of absentee ballots outstanding */,
  "absentee_max_ballots" INTEGER /* Maximum number of absentee ballots */,
  "provisional_outstanding" INTEGER /* Number of provisional ballots outstanding */,
  "provisional_count_progress" TEXT /* Provisional ballot count progress */,
  "election_type" TEXT /* Type of election (e.g., presidential, congressional) */,
  "turnout_rate" REAL /* Overall turnout rate for the election */,
  "mail_voting" INTEGER /* Number of votes cast by mail */,
  "in_person_voting" INTEGER /* Number of votes cast in person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voting_trends_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES election_results ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the access device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES election_results ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date */,
  "retrieved_time" TEXT /* Date the data was retrieved */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "data_quality_score" REAL /* Quality score for the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_metadata_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES election_results ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leaderboard" (
  "leaderboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leaderboard entry */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election */,
  "leader_margin_value" REAL /* Leader's margin value */,
  "leader_margin_display" TEXT /* Leader's margin display */,
  "leader_margin_name_display" TEXT /* Leader's margin name display */,
  "leader_party_id" TEXT /* Leader's party ID */,
  "leader_key" TEXT /* Leader's key */,
  "election_type" TEXT /* Type of election (e.g., presidential, congressional) */,
  "leader_party_name" TEXT /* Full name of the leader's party */,
  "trailing_candidate_name" TEXT /* Name of the trailing candidate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leaderboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaderboard_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES election_results ("election_id")
)
